reviews.comment:
La atención es buena, normalmente no se les agota el combustible. No posee servicompras, sería interesante lo tuviera. La estación más próxima está a 50km.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, and they usually don't run out of fuel. They don't have a convenience store, which would be nice. The nearest station is 50 km away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdnVLT19nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una de las dos opciones para cargar combustible en Humahuaca. Las instalaciones son básicas, la entrada y salida algo complicada si hay mucho tráfico. Los precios de los combustibles son mucho más caros comparados con las ciudades grandes. La atención es muy buena y aceptan tarjetas de crédito y débito

(Translated by Google)
One of two options for refueling in Humahuaca. The facilities are basic, and entry and exit are somewhat complicated in heavy traffic. Fuel prices are much higher compared to larger cities. The service is very good, and credit and debit cards are accepted.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdEtLaXlBRRAB
